verdicts.new_quoted_text: stakeholders receive the report on schedule without anyone lifting a finger
verdicts.reasoning: The US1 story's 'so that' clause was reworded but conveys the same on-time-without-manual-effort outcome the comment questions.
FR-003 (retain the three most recent export artifacts per schedule) is entirely absent from the new document, so the retention content the comment was about is gone.
FR-004's failure-notification recipient survived as 'the report owner' in the reworded row, matching the owner-notification content the comment addresses.
